query:
SELECT
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM workspace WHERE deleted = false) as "has_workspace!",
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM script WHERE archived = false AND deleted = false) as "has_script!",
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM flow WHERE archived = false) as "has_flow!",
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM app) as "has_app!",
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM schedule WHERE enabled = true) as "has_schedule!",
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM v2_job_completed) as "has_job_run!",
            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM password) > 1 as "has_multiple_users!",
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM resource) as "has_resource!"
